subcodes.first_line: God willing, may ye, through the divine bestowals and the effusions of the All-Merciful, attain success and be turned in contemplation toward the Dawning-Place of the names of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انشاء الله بعنایات الهیه و فیوضات رحمانیه فائز باشید و بمطلع اسماء الله ناظر الیوم بر
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @differences in human capacity, @contention and conflict, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @wisdom [hikmat]
